name: notion
tagline: ClawHub (267★): Notion API for creating and managing pages, databases, and blocks.
verdict: Serious gap: total silence on error handling -- no check that the credentials file exists before use, and no guidance for curl failures, 401/403 auth errors, or the rate limit it itself mentions. A bad key or throttled request could fail confusingly with no recovery path.

highlights.summary: No check that the key file exists/is non-empty before use, and no guidance anywhere for handling curl failures, 401/403 auth errors, or the rate limit mentioned at line 155 — total
The create-page (and create-data-source) operations have no existence check before creating; running the same step twice produces a duplicate page/database with no detection or ski
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language appears anywhere in the description or body; the skill has multiple operations (search, CRUD on pages/data sources), s
